title: Verify Prerequisites
description: Verify Redis is running, docker-compose is healthy, and .env.local placeholders exist for Passport keys.

title: Configure Infrastructure for Redis
description: Update .env, .env.example, and docker-compose.yml to switch CACHE_STORE, SESSION_DRIVER, and QUEUE_CONNECTION to redis.

title: Replace Sanctum with Passport
description: Require laravel/passport via composer, remove laravel/sanctum, publish Passport migrations, and run migrations.

title: Configure Auth Guard and User Model
description: Update config/auth.php to use the passport driver for the API guard. Change the HasApiTokens trait in the User model to use Passport's trait.

title: Implement Passport Token Issuance with Custom Claims
description: Update AuthService to issue a Passport Personal Access Token. Subscribe to AccessTokenCreated or similar to inject 'role' and 'department' into the JWT payload.

title: Implement Redis Authorization Cache
description: Update RolePermissionService and AuthService to store fine-grained permissions in Redis keyed by user_permissions:{user_id}. Ensure immediate invalidation when roles/permissions change.

title: Implement JWT Token Blacklist
description: Update AuthService logout flow to add the token JTI to a Redis blacklist (jwt_blacklist:{jti}) with a TTL equal to the token expiration.

title: Remove Old Sanctum Artefacts
description: Delete the old Sanctum personal_access_tokens migration, remove the verify-token endpoint, and remove Sanctum middleware from bootstrap/app.php.
